title: Pet Food * Women - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Pet Food * Women 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Foster Families Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Women Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ROSE HAVEN ROSE HAVEN DAY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center that assists with food, showers, laundry facilities, clothing, hygiene items, diapers, pet food, and temporary mailing addresses. Advocates are available to help connect individuals to resources and provide emotional support. Outdoor gear provided when available. 1740 NW Glisan Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Women, transgender, non-binary, and gender-expansive adults and their minor children Hours: -Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-noon for shelter, services from 8:30am-11:30am -Tuesday/Thursday 8am-3:30pm for shelter, services from 8:30am-11:30am and 1pm-3:30pm -Wednesday 1pm-3:30pm for guests with minor children only Email (503) 248-6364 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROSE HAVEN ROSE HAVEN DAY CENTER
